title: Cod Fritters with Savory Batter
description: A traditional Portuguese recipe where cod is mixed with a savory batter and deep-fried to perfection.

ingredients.name: Savory batter mix
ingredients.notes: Or make your own batter with flour, salt, pepper, and herbs

instructions: Cut cod into small pieces and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together savory batter mix, flour, breadcrumbs, eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
Add cod pieces to the bowl and mix until well coated.
Heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, drop small amounts of the cod mixture into the oil.
Fry for about 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown and crispy.
Drain fritters on paper towels and serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
